utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final package, all 7 items are present. Now check if each is fully specified with all details: 
1. destination – 'Prague, Czech Republic' (fully specified). 
2. travel_dates – 'June 15-19, 2024 (5 days)' (fully specified). 
3. transportation – includes flight details (from Paris CDG to Prague, economy class) and costs (€200 total) (fully specified). 
4. accommodation – includes hotel name (Family Haven Hotel), type (3-star), location (historic district), and cost (€525 total) (fully specified). 
5. activities – includes a specific activity (Street Art Walking Tour), cost (€80 total), and per-person breakdown (fully specified). 
6. additional_services – includes identified restaurants accommodating dietary needs (strawberry allergy) and communication of requirements (fully specified). 
7. total_budget – includes full cost breakdown and total (€1,700 total budget utilized) (fully specified). 
All 7 items are covered and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes the following items: destination 'Prague, Czech Republic', transportation 'Budget flights from Paris CDG to Prague, economy class', accommodation 'Family Haven Hotel', and an activity 'Street Art Walking Tour'.
